# atlassian_jira_project_role (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jira Cloud project role by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "atlassian_jira_project_role" "example" {
  name = "Developers"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the project role to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the project role.
- `id` (String) The ID of the project role.
